title: ParaLLM OpenAI Mini | Unconstrained | Two Adversarials
description: OpenAI mini Para run with two targeted adversarial lanes and no extra answer-side style harness.

workers.label: Control-plane sceptic
workers.role: pressure-test the first-hour plan for management-plane trust, evidence loss, and unsafe remediation sequencing
workers.focus: find places where the plan trusts or uses a possibly compromised RMM or PSA too early or destroys evidence

workers.label: Comms and governance sceptic
workers.role: pressure-test the plan for per-customer ticketing, major-incident discipline, compliance-safe communications, and operator management structure
workers.focus: find missing internal major incident tracking, per-customer ownership, and cross-tenant communication risks
